name: Splendiferous Guacamole Dip
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup fresh cilantro (chopped), or 4 teaspoons dried cilantro (crushed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and pit the avocados, then coarsely mash them in a bowl with a fork.
2. Mix in the lime juice, blending well.
3. Add the diced tomatoes, onion, jalapeno pepper, hot sauce, and fresh or dried cilantro one at a time, blending after each addition until smooth.
4. Garnish with sour cream and sprinkle a little cilantro on top. Serve at room temperature or chilled.
Makes about 5-1/4 cups of dip.
Suggested dippers: Warm tortilla chips, baby corn, black olives, jicama, mushrooms.
